name: NVIDIA NeMo Toolkit (Conversational AI Framework)

auth.notes: Local library; NGC registry requires NVIDIA API key for model downloads

performance.notes: NVIDIA GPU required; multi-GPU/multi-node with Megatron-LM; highly optimized for NVIDIA hardware

agent_readiness.notes: NVIDIA's framework for LLM/ASR/TTS/NLP training. import nemo.collections.asr as nemo_asr. asr_model = nemo_asr.models.EncDecCTCModel.from_pretrained('QuartzNet15x5Base-En'). transcript = asr_model.transcribe(['audio.wav']). TTS: nemo_tts.models.FastPitch.from_pretrained(). LLM training: NeMo Megatron for GPT/BERT/T5 at scale. Collections: ASR, TTS, NLP, LLM, Vision. PyTorch Lightning based. NeMo 2.0 has breaking API changes from 1.x. Requires NVIDIA GPU. Multi-GPU with tensor/pipeline parallelism.

gotchas: NVIDIA GPU required — no CPU/MPS fallback
NeMo 2.0 has breaking API changes from NeMo 1.x
Large installation — many dependencies including apex, Megatron-LM
Documentation can lag behind rapid development
NGC model registry access requires NVIDIA account
best_when: Large-scale LLM pretraining/fine-tuning on NVIDIA multi-GPU clusters
Production ASR systems with NVIDIA Riva deployment target
When NVIDIA infrastructure is the primary deployment target
avoid_when: Simple ASR inference (use whisper or faster-whisper instead)
Teams without NVIDIA ML infrastructure expertise
summary: NVIDIA NeMo is a GPU-accelerated framework for ASR, TTS, and LLM training. nemo_asr.models.EncDecCTCModel.from_pretrained('QuartzNet15x5Base-En').transcribe(['audio.wav']). Collections: ASR, TTS, NLP, LLM (Megatron-LM). Multi-GPU with tensor/pipeline parallelism. PyTorch Lightning based. Apache-2.0. NVIDIA GPU required. NeMo 2.0 has breaking changes from 1.x. Best for NVIDIA-infrastructure LLM/ASR/TTS training at scale.
